name: Amplitude
pitch: Digital analytics platform for product and marketing teams

name: Mixpanel

name: Segment
pitch: Customer data platform collecting and routing user data

name: Datadog
pitch: Cloud monitoring and security platform for modern applications

name: PagerDuty

description: PagerDuty helps teams respond to incidents faster with real-time alerting escalation policies and on-call management

name: HashiCorp
pitch: Infrastructure automation platform for cloud provisioning
description: HashiCorp provides infrastructure as code tools including Terraform Vault and Consul used by 3400+ enterprise customers

name: Snyk
pitch: Developer security platform finding and fixing code vulnerabilities
description: Snyk helps developers find and automatically fix security vulnerabilities in code open-source dependencies containers and IaC

name: Wiz
pitch: Cloud security platform protecting infrastructure and data

name: Lacework
pitch: Data-driven cloud security platform with anomaly detection
description: Lacework uses AI to detect threats and vulnerabilities across cloud environments reducing alert fatigue for security teams

name: Abnormal Security
pitch: AI-native email security platform stopping advanced attacks
description: Abnormal Security uses AI to detect and block sophisticated email attacks including phishing BEC and supply chain compromises

name: Arctic Wolf
pitch: Concierge security operations platform for mid-market companies
description: Arctic Wolf provides 24x7 security operations monitoring detection and response with a dedicated team for every customer

name: Vectra AI
pitch: AI-powered threat detection and response for hybrid environments
description: Vectra AI uses machine learning to detect and prioritise cyber threats across cloud network and identity infrastructure

name: Verkada
pitch: Cloud-managed physical security platform for enterprises
description: Verkada provides cloud-managed cameras access control environmental sensors and alarms for enterprise physical security

name: Darktrace
pitch: AI-powered cyber defence for detecting and responding to threats
description: Darktrace uses AI to autonomously detect and respond to cyber threats in real time across cloud network and email

name: Semgrep
pitch: Code security platform catching vulnerabilities before production
description: Semgrep provides static analysis security scanning for code helping developers find and fix vulnerabilities during development

name: Chainalysis
pitch: Blockchain analytics and compliance platform for governments and banks
description: Chainalysis provides blockchain analytics tools helping governments exchanges and financial institutions investigate crypto crime

name: Coinbase
pitch: Leading US cryptocurrency exchange and wallet platform
description: Coinbase is the most trusted cryptocurrency exchange enabling people to buy sell and store Bitcoin Ethereum and 200+ assets

name: Celestia
pitch: Modular blockchain network for scalable decentralised applications
description: Celestia is the first modular data availability network enabling developers to deploy their own blockchains easily

name: Dune Analytics
pitch: Crypto analytics platform for querying blockchain data
description: Dune enables anyone to query Ethereum and other blockchain data with SQL and share visualisations publicly

name: Tensor Energy
pitch: AI-powered energy management platform for industrial facilities
description: Tensor Energy uses AI to optimise energy consumption in factories and data centres reducing costs and carbon emissions

name: Turntide Technologies
pitch: Smart motor systems replacing inefficient industrial motors globally
description: Turntide produces smart switched reluctance motors that cut energy consumption by 64% in HVAC and commercial buildings

name: Pachama
pitch: Technology platform verifying carbon offset forest projects
description: Pachama uses remote sensing and AI to verify and monitor forest carbon projects helping companies achieve climate goals

name: Impossible Foods
pitch: Plant-based meat brand making delicious sustainable protein
description: Impossible Foods creates plant-based burgers sausages and chicken that taste like meat while using 96% less land

name: Perfect Day
pitch: Precision fermentation to produce animal-free dairy proteins
description: Perfect Day uses microflora to produce whey and casein proteins identical to milk without cows enabling sustainable dairy

name: Nuvation Bio
pitch: Clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company developing cancer therapies
description: Nuvation Bio develops innovative cancer therapeutics using novel mechanisms of action to address unmet oncology needs

name: Recursion Pharmaceuticals
pitch: AI-driven drug discovery platform decoding biology at scale

name: Generate Biomedicines

name: Sana Biotechnology
pitch: Cell and gene therapy platform for engineering cells as medicines
description: Sana develops engineered cells that can be used as medicines to treat cancer autoimmune diseases and genetic disorders

name: SpaceX
pitch: Private space exploration and satellite internet provider
description: SpaceX develops Falcon 9 Falcon Heavy Starship rockets and Starlink satellite internet serving 3 million users globally

name: Relativity Space
pitch: 3D printing rocket manufacturer building the future of space
description: Relativity Space 3D prints entire rockets with only 1000 parts vs 100000 enabling on-demand manufacturing for space

name: Pixxel
pitch: Earth observation startup building a hyperspectral satellite constellation
description: Pixxel builds and operates hyperspectral earth observation satellites providing high-frequency global imaging for climate and industries

name: Agnikul Cosmos
pitch: Indian startup building 3D-printed rockets for small satellite launches
description: Agnikul Cosmos is building Agnibaan a fully 3D-printed semi-cryogenic launch vehicle for small satellite missions in India

name: Skyroot Aerospace
pitch: India's first private rocket company with orbital launch vehicle
description: Skyroot Aerospace is building the Vikram series of launch vehicles providing affordable access to space for small satellites
